abstract: A key whose value indicates a list of items to search.
overview:
## Discussion

To provide your own set of items to be filtered by a search query rather than searching the keychain, specify this search key in a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)] function with a value that consists of an object of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFArray] where the array contains either [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainItem], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKey], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCertificate], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecIdentity], or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] items. The objects in the provided array must all be of the same type.

To convert from persistent item references to normal item references, specify this search key in a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)] function with a value of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFArray] where the array contains one or more [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] elements (the persistent references), and a return-type key of [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecReturnRef] whose value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanTrue].

To delete an item identified by a transient reference, specify the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecMatchItemList] search key in a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemDelete(_:)] function with a reference returned by using the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecReturnRef] return type key in a previous call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAdd(_:_:)] functions.

To delete an item identified by a persistent reference, specify the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecMatchItemList] search key in a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemDelete(_:)] function with a persistent reference returned by using the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecReturnPersistentRef] return type key to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAdd(_:_:)] functions.

# kSecMatchItemList

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates a list of items to search.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecMatchItemList: CFString
```

## Discussion

To provide your own set of items to be filtered by a search query rather than searching the keychain, specify this search key in a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)] function with a value that consists of an object of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFArray] where the array contains either [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainItem], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKey], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCertificate], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecIdentity], or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] items. The objects in the provided array must all be of the same type.

To convert from persistent item references to normal item references, specify this search key in a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)] function with a value of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFArray] where the array contains one or more [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] elements (the persistent references), and a return-type key of [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecReturnRef] whose value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanTrue].

To delete an item identified by a transient reference, specify the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecMatchItemList] search key in a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemDelete(_:)] function with a reference returned by using the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecReturnRef] return type key in a previous call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAdd(_:_:)] functions.

To delete an item identified by a persistent reference, specify the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecMatchItemList] search key in a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemDelete(_:)] function with a persistent reference returned by using the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecReturnPersistentRef] return type key to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemCopyMatching(_:_:)] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAdd(_:_:)] functions.
title: kSecMatchItemList
